description: Gnosis EasyAuction unclaimed WETH refunds. Users placed bids (sellAmount WETH) that cleared below the auction price and were not filled; the WETH is refundable via claimFromParticipantOrder. The gnosis-auction UI is dead; the contract is immutable with no deadline. Per-user balance is the exact WETH refund from simulating claimFromParticipantOrder via eth_call.
